name: Bud Planter
description: The little buds here are getting ready to bloom

name: Blue Flower Bed
description: The blooming bluebells sway in the wind.

name: Fairy Bluebells
description: When the bluebells sway in the wind, you can almost hear the sound of bells ringing.

name: Azure Sky
description: It is as if the bluebells are twinkling in the night sky.

name: Innocent Memories
description: The blue wind chime sways in the wind, invoking memories of innocent times.

name: Dash Of Red
description: One beautiful little rose is growing here.

name: Red Flower Bed
description: The blooming roses are full of life!

name: Ruby Sea
description: Full of glittering red gems.

name: Love And Beauty
description: Love as wide as the world and as deep as the sea.

name: White Romance
description: Romance is white, the color of snow and of clouds.

name: Terracotta Plant Pot
description: Here's where the little sunflowers grow up!

name: Rectangle Flower Bed
description: The sunflowers greet the sunrise with a smile.

name: Courtyard Flower Bed
description: The courtyard is full of life!

name: Modern Greenhouse
description: Even without sunlight, the garden is still thriving!

name: Wrought Iron Flowerbed
description: Looks somewhat artistic.

name: Small Plant Pot
description: Can only fit a single flower.

name: Yellow Flower Bed
description: The blooming daisies look so happy and carefree!

name: Medium Flower Bed
description: You can smell the scent of daisies.

name: Greenhouse Garden
description: The flowers have faded, leaving only the daisies in full bloom.

name: Vintage Flowerbed
description: Daisies blooming within a classic flowerbed, a dash of playfulness mixed with vintage.

name: Bowl Fountain
description: Lv.1: Can't be smashed. No climbing!

name: Bird Bath
description: Lv.2: A place for birds to splash about

name: River God Pond
description: Lv.2: Sometimes the river god will help you get back things you've dropped in...

name: Bastet Fountain
description: Lv.3: The cat goddess will give you shelter!

name: Floating Teacup
description: Lv.4: Why is the teacup flying?

name: Sadako's Well
description: Lv.4: It's quite tiring to hang there as well.

name: Sweet Dream
description: Lv.4: A sweet dream will come true every time a wish is made.

name: Fruity Fountain
description: Lv.4: Come join in the fruity pool party!

name: Pirates' Barrel
description: Lv.5: It's said that wine barrels that crossed the sea are better for making wishes.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Lucky Bell
description: Lv.3: The snowman waits for his friend underneath the bell.

name: Carp of Fortune
description: Lv.4: Make a wish to the carp to get a year of good luck!

name: Celestial Spring
description: Lv.5: Don't worry, at least the stars will keep you company.

name: Mid-air Imagination
description: Lv.4: I wanna fly up into the sky. I'm sure the clouds are like cotton candy!

name: Ghost Staff Fountain
description: Lv.4: For any work inquiries, please find us during our business hours: 9:00AM - 5:00PM.

name: Sweet Loop
description: Lv.4: The syrup inside is recycled for repeated use. Don't tell anyone!

name: Fountain Goddess
description: Lv.4: It's said that some employee spent a serious sum of money in order to have this made.

name: Winter Skates
description: Lv.4: Winter is here! That can only mean one thing: ice skating!

name: Fine Wine
description: Lv.4: An intoxicating brew that lets one dream up a grand adventure.

name: Duckling Gathering
description: Lv.3: Quack, Quack, Quack. Can you understand what they are saying?

name: Milky Flow
description: Lv.4: My greatest wish is to have unlimited snacks to enjoy!

name: Cupid's Spring
description: Lv.5: I heard that drinking from this spring allows one to find true love!

name: Moonglow Spring
description: Lv.5: A dragonling will always be bubbling away here, waiting for its next encounter with you.

name: Fervid Rainbow
description: Lv.4: Put your hands up! Let's hear some noise! !

name: Rippling Winged Pond
description: Lv.4: As sunlight permeates the wings, it casts a mesmerizing ray of light onto the wishing well below.

name: Ladies' Dreamy Tower
description: Lv.5: Silently make a wish and the puppy will make it come true.

name: Pumpkin Ghoul Fountain
description: Lv.5: You wish will be granted... no matter what it takes.

name: Azure Wish
description: Lv.5: Make a wish while facing the ocean and I'm sure that the ocean will grant it in return.

name: Chickadee Singing Class
description: Lv.4: Each year, the chickadee performing on stage has to go through many rounds of selection!

name: Lotus Fountain
description: Lv.4: Make a wish to the koi fish swimming inside the fountain!

name: Floating Spring
description: Lv.4: You'll be released from the restrictions of gravity when you drink from this spring.

name: Spring of Purity
description: Lv.5: As pure as a swan's feathers.

name: Butterfly Wishes
description: Lv.5: Are you listening to my wish too, little butterfly?

name: Simple Table
description: Sip tea and enjoy the flowers

name: Cozy Table
description: The whole family can enjoy the flowers, sweets, and coziness

name: Artsy Table
description: Tea followed by the scent of flowers tastes even stronger

name: Ornate Table
description: Fits right in with the flowerbeds

name: Halloween Table
description: It is laden with food you will eat on Halloween.

name: Reverie Table
description: Delicious desserts used for holding unbirthday parties.

name: Dessert Long Table
description: Flower viewing and having desserts go hand in hand!

name: Fruity Long Table
description: Replenish your vitamins! It's healthy and tasty!

name: Seaside Table
description: You can almost feel the sea breeze.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Christmas Long Table
description: Prince made the Christmas tree and wreath on the table.

name: Oriental Long Table
description: The Mengding tea it brews is full-bodied and sweet.

name: Sky Gazing
description: Why not try looking for the brightest star with a telescope under the moon?

name: Gear Long Table
description: This strange flavor seems to have come from another planet!

name: Antique Long Table
description: It might look a bit worn, but the elegant taste of its former owner is still visible.

name: Long Sketching Table
description: The carefree artist always leaves their painting tools lying around.

name: Snowy Night Tea Party
description: The little bear keeps the water hot so you can enjoy tea at any time.

name: Courtyard Snow
description: The sound of snow falling is its way of saying goodbye to the chilly depths of winter.

name: Cute Party
description: Little cuties often gather here to party.

name: Relaxing Taste
description: Enjoy a rare, relaxing afternoon here.

name: True Love Never Dies
description: Regardless how the food on the table changes, the roses in the cupboard will never wither.

name: Dream Encounter
description: Once you step into the moonlit garden, you'll find someone who has been waiting for you here all night.

name: Mirror Rhapsody
description: Come have a taste of this lemon cake!

name: Early Summertime Reunion
description: The beaming sunshine is nice, just as the time spent with friends is.

name: Aqua Tea Party
description: Are they cosmetic tools or mini desserts? You decide!

name: Late-Night Rhapsody
description: Dum dee dum~ Finish the food on the table and something strange will happen!

name: Floating Afternoon Tea
description: What would you like to eat?

name: Gingerbread Snow Carriage
description: Choo choo~ The train is entering the station! Please wait for the train to come to a stop before you touch it!

name: Arboretum Wonder
description: Reciting poems in this courtyard with a couple of close friends is quite a lively activity indeed!

name: Cosmic Afternoon Tea
description: You can dine while listening to the latest cosmic news.

name: Romantic Long Table
description: During your spare time, you can sit by this table and listen to all sorts of fairytales.

name: Elegant Afternoon
description: An invitation from the flowers. Do come join us!

name: Stump Mailbox
description: A simply-made mailbox

name: Hummingbird Post
description: Your mail will get there slowly but surely!

name: Eagle Express
description: The symbol of speed and quality!

name: Modern Mailbox
description: Safe and reliable

name: Gluttonous Kitty
description: It might eat your letters too...

name: Pumpkin Chest
description: What exactly is in it?

name: Witch's Hoard
description: All of the witch's secrets are hidden in here.

name: Ice Cream Mailbox
description: I don't know where Hedwig hid the letter either.

name: Mr. Banana
description: A passionate banana who seems to want to greet you.

name: Blue Lighthouse
description: Lights the way for Hedwig to come home.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Letter from the Snow
description: Let me tell you a secret—an elf lives in the mailbox!

name: Lucky Mailbox
description: Hedwig was the one who hung up the Chinese Knot.

name: Rose House
description: Your letters will carry the fragrance of roses.

name: Iron Clock Mailbox
description: Will we get a letter when the clock hands make a full rotation?

name: Fettering Mailbox
description: Pick up your mail as fast as possible, or else you might get caught.

name: Random Box
description: When you press the handle on the side, different candies will appear at random inside.

name: Morning Glory Memories
description: Store your memories here.

name: Travel Case
description: I've filled several suitcases with my longing for you!

name: Messenger of Love
description: When the icy snow melts, the spring breeze shall cover my longing.

name: Giraffe Mailbox
description: The giraffe carefully keeps every precious letter it receives.

name: Sweet Letter
description: The words convey sweet thoughts of longing.

name: Murmuring Coffin
description: If there's anything you wish to say, just bury it for eternity with this coffin.

name: Winged Glory
description: Letters from afar are kept safe in the embrace of these wings.

name: Jenga
description: 'Ugh, why is your letter in a complete mess?! ' demanded the little mouse furiously.

name: Honeyed Letter
description: A letter that smells like sweet honey! Who sent it, I wonder?

name: Treasure Box of Memories
description: Hello, hello! Puppy #1 at your service!

name: Ghoul Express
description: Ghouuul evening! You have mail!

name: Boat of Drifting Letters
description: It carries feelings of wistfulness from the opposite shore.

name: Chiming Bell Letter Box
description: As the bell chimes at twelve o'clock, the letters inside the clock will be updated.

name: Brocade Letters From Afar
description: Please convey my distant feelings of my longing to my family.

name: Cosmic Letter
description: Will aliens send mail?

name: Fluttering Envelopes
description: Your yearnings will transform into little birds that fly toward the ones you miss.

name: Dream Mailbox
description: The birds will take good care of your letters!

name: Stone Path
description: A commonly-seen stone path

name: Wooden Path
description: Made with wood taken from some place's door planks

name: Slab Path
description: A modern cement path

name: Moss Path
description: A stone path made by the god of the Wishing Well

name: Poker Avenue
description: Every victory makes it a bit brighter!

name: Skeleton Trail
description: A path paved with bones. It seems a little creepy.

name: Chocolate Path
description: Sweet every step of the way.

name: Watermelon Path
description: It's exceptionally refreshing to walk on it after the rain.

name: Shell Path
description: Colorful seashells found by the seashore.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Christmas Stocking Path
description: Good children will find a present from Santa in their stockings.

name: Fan Trail
description: You can grab fans for a fan dance here.

name: Scattered Manuscripts
description: Filled with words that you cannot read. Looks really mysterious.

name: Lost Path
description: People often lose their things on this path, so keep an eye on your belongings while you're walking!

name: Tattered Red Carpet
description: This red carpet is used for welcoming guests, but somehow it's been torn into pieces.

name: Elegant Path
description: Strolling along this path is the epitome of contentment.

name: Swaying Stardust
description: The stars accidentally fell and became decorations in the snow.

name: Landscape Painting Scroll
description: A painting that captures all the beauty of the world.

name: Polka Dot Path
description: The fluffy polka dots are very comfortable to walk on.

name: Cheesy Path
description: Wouldn't mice come and eat the delicious cheese here?

name: Psyche's Journey
description: Although the journey is arduous, we'll reunite eventually.

name: Moonlit Musings
description: As I walk across these round bricks, will they light up with a magical glow?

name: Neon Stars
description: Extremely sturdy despite being made of glass.

name: Honeycomb Floor Tiles
description: Don't worry about breaking them. They're made from very sturdy glass!

name: Sweet Path
description: It smells so sweet and aromatic! It is really inedible?

name: Diamond Footpath
description: This path seems to lead into a whole new world...

name: Ancient Deep-sea Path
description: I wonder how long this road has been lying untouched on the ocean floor.

name: Abandoned Track
description: Although the track has been abandoned, children love playing hopscotch on it.

name: Pastel Bricks
description: Seeing the beautiful flowers blooming by the roadside makes me want to dance.

name: Celestial Ring Road
description: Walking here feels like going on a space walk.

name: Path of Adventure
description: Tenacious little rose, time to embark on your next adventure!

name: Flower Bud Long Carpet
description: It feels soft when you step on it.

name: Simple Fence
description: A simply-made fence

name: Birch Fence
description: No need to worry about the wind blowing it over!

name: Oak Fence
description: Solid and reliable

name: Rustic Fence
description: A meticulously-crafted fence

name: Cemetery
description: It leads to some mysterious places.

name: Reverie Fence
description: A partition to an unknown fantasy world.

name: Sweet Hedge
description: Keeps all the sweetness in.

name: Persimmon Door
description: Everything will be smooth sailing once you pass through this door.

name: Rope Fence
description: The rope is caked with dried sea salt.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: First Snowfall
description: The snowman secretly watches his friend from outside the fence.

name: Fortune Comes Knocking
description: The gold ingot on the fence brings in wealth and fortune.

name: Fantasy Door
description: Go through this door and enter a magical world.

name: Spring Fence
description: There are lots of springs in the grass. We can use them to jump!

name: Lavender Love
description: Wait- wait for the flower to bloom.

name: Snow Veil
description: It will appear before you if you know magic.

name: Misty Mountains
description: It's as if the mountains and the rivers are painted in the same color.

name: Pink Memories
description: Pink flowers carry fond memories.

name: Daylight Party
description: With enough daylight, each plant will grow up tall and healthy!

name: Dark Moon Invitation
description: Pass through the thorns to come enjoy this feast!

name: Twilight Veil
description: A whole new world awaits you behind this door.

name: Broken Musical Notes
description: Wave those glow sticks in your hands!

name: Sunflowers' Promise
description: The sunflowers lift their heads as they anxiously search for the sun.

name: Bellflower Blessings
description: Rumor has it that pushing open the love gate will grant you good fortune.

name: Shrieking Fence
description: A new face around here. Welcome, customer.

name: Elegant Ocean
description: Welcome to the calm and elegant part of the ocean.

name: Snowy Platform
description: If you wish to go to World of Snow, please board the train from Platform 1.

name: Spring Garden
description: The blooming flowers symbolize the vitality of spring.

name: Cloudy Language of Stars
description: What are the stars talking about?

name: Rose Promenade
description: Freely run amid the rose bushes!

name: Silky Flower Garden
description: It's the season for hydrangea blooms! Put on your best dress and come take a picture!

name: Simple Barbecue
description: It needs someone to keep turning it

name: Hanging Barbecue
description: Gives a primitive feel and a taste of the wild

name: Modern Barbecue
description: All the fixings for delicious color, aroma, and taste

name: Rotating Barbecue
description: Provides both convenience and flavor

name: Gleeful Gateball
description: The latest in entertainment facilities! Though the mallet looks a bit familiar...

name: Bone Barbecue
description: Who knows what living creature these bones came from.

name: Ice Cream Barbecue
description: Ice cream will definitely melt!

name: Durian Barbecue
description: You either love it or hate it.

name: Suitcase Barbecue
description: A must for travelers!
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Reindeer Barbecue
description: Have you heard the story of Rudolph the Red-nosed Reindeer?

name: Brazier Barbecue
description: A roaring fire with big bites of meat!

name: Mysterious Seasoning
description: Everyone wants to find out the secret behind the barbecue seasoning, but it seems nobody knows.

name: Steam-powered Barbecue
description: A completely automatic barbeque that keeps your hands free.

name: Lava Monster Barbecue
description: It'll spit fire, but it still provides a great service!

name: Fluffy Marshmallow Rack
description: It looks soft and fluffy. Slowly toast over low heat.

name: Pearl Flower-Drying Rack
description: The mysterious artist dries the flowers to make them into pigments.

name: Igloo Oven
description: Even though it's made of snow, it doesn't melt when baking things!

name: Fireside Tales
description: Gather round the fireplace and pour your hearts out to one another.

name: Flavors of Spring
description: What does spring taste like? It tastes like happiness.

name: Active Breakfast Machine
description: A great day starts with a great breakfast!

name: Forgotten Rack
description: Tools that have been left behind for a very long time. You can occasionally hear crying when you pass by it.

name: Nascent Spark
description: The initial fiery spark has now become an endless source of energy.

name: Colorful Party
description: Are you sure you don't want a kebab while you dance?

name: Skyward Delicacy
description: These skewers taste heavenly!

name: Revolving Golden Dreams
description: Will barbecuing meat on a gemstone-inlaid grill make it taste better?

name: Aromatic Whiff
description: The sound of meats sizzling on the grill is music to anyone's ears!

name: Slow-grilled Seafood
description: A way of cooking that preserves the briny tang of the ocean.

name: Blazing Apple
description: A warm oven that is protected from the winds is a necessity during the winter nights!

name: Tea Stove
description: Aside from the tea, I also roasted an orange. Would you like one?

name: Blazing Stardust
description: How hot do planets get?

name: Scorched Roses
description: They naturally emit the aroma of rose sea salt.

name: Summer Flavors
description: Smells of dampness and the color amber.
